system-outline.p: When the door lock control SW of the driver’s or passenger’s side door is pushed to UNLOCK, the door lock will unlock.
When the door lock control SW of the driver’s or passenger’s side door is pushed to LOCK, the door lock will lock.
When the driver’s side door is unlocked once using the ignition key, only the driver’s side door is unlocked. If this operation is repeated within 3 seconds, all the other doors are unlocked.
